metadata.title:
BELLINCHAM BAY Line


HEADS TOWARD SPOKANE

pages.raw_text:
Further evidence that the Belling-
ham Bay and British Columbia rail-
road intends entering Spokane is fur
nished by local bankers through whom
bonds are offered ror safe. These
bonds are only offered for extensions
of the road at the rate Of $4,000 per
mile.


The prospectus states that the B.
b. & B. C. r. r. Is California cor
poration and the entire capital stock
Is owned by the following San Fran
cisco capitalists: ID. o. Mills, Alvin
"a Hayward, p. p. Cornwall, Lloyd
Tevis Estab, ]. B. Haggin and 8.
Prentiss Smith.


The main line extends from What
com, where connection is made with
the Great Northern, northeast to
Sumas, where connection il made with
both Northern PACING and Canadian
Pacific, thence southeasterly to Ma
